ImportDataSrc.clientToken: Ensures idempotency of the API call
ImportDataSrc.bucket: BOS Bucket of the data source (only buckets in the same region are supported)
ImportDataSrc.otherAccount: Whether the bucket belongs to another account; if true, AK/SK with read/write permission on the imported bucket must be provided. Default: false
ImportDataSrc.bucketAK: Required when otherAccount is true; no encryption needed
ImportDataSrc.bucketSK: Required when otherAccount is true; must be encrypted using the secret key corresponding to request header x-bce-accesskey. Refer to the Password Encryption Transmission Specification and the aes128_encrypt_16char_key() function in bce-python-sdk
ImportDataSrc.bucketStsToken: Effective when otherAccount is true; no encryption needed
ImportDataSrc.dirPrefix: Directory prefix of the BOS bucket. Default: /. For example, to import all objects under bos:/bucket_name/model_data/2025/, set dirPrefix to /model_data/2025/
ImportDataSrc.keepSymlink: Whether to preserve BOS symbolic links. Keeping symlinks reduces import efficiency and incremental metadata sync performance. Default: false
ImportDataSrc.authGroupId: Permission group ID; the default permission group ID is AG-RAPIDFS_DEFAULT_AUTHGROUP_ID
ImportDataSrc.quotaMiB: Capacity quota for the data source, representing the maximum available capacity; cannot exceed the total cache capacity of the instance
